subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God! Among the evidences of divine grace and favor, and the characteristics—nay, rather, the most mighty proofs of the appearance of the signs of power [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی از آثار فضل و الطاف الهی و خصائص بل اعظم دلائل ظهور ایات قدرت
subcodes.subjects: @unity in diversity, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
